name: RecoveryStorageOperationContracts
description: Concrete request, result, fingerprint, and stable-error contracts for backups, restore, storage status, and safe evolution.
schema_def: All operations use the common OperationDescriptor envelopes. Create, prepare, and activate operations are mutations and require --idempotency-key.
tally ledger backup create / ledger.backup.create
- input: {targetPath: absolute non-existing file path}
- result: {artifactId, path, sha256, contractVersion, storageVersion, storeGenerationFingerprint, durableCounts, exactTotals, createdAt}
- errors: LEDGER-BACKUP-TARGET-EXISTS exit5; LEDGER-PATH-UNSAFE exit3; LEDGER-BACKUP-VERIFY-FAILED exit8; LEDGER-HOST-SPACE-INSUFFICIENT exit9
tally ledger backup verify / ledger.backup.verify
- input: {artifactPath: absolute file path}

- result VerificationReport: {artifactId, sha256, storageVersion, storeGenerationFingerprint, integrity, foreignKeys, durableCounts, exactTotals, history, relationships, idempotencyOutcomes, verifiedAt}
- errors: LEDGER-BACKUP-NOT-FOUND exit4; LEDGER-BACKUP-CHECKSUM-MISMATCH exit8; LEDGER-BACKUP-INTEGRITY-FAILED exit8; LEDGER-BACKUP-INCOMPATIBLE exit7
tally ledger restore prepare / ledger.restore.prepare
- input: {artifactPath}
- result: {candidateId, sourceFingerprint, candidateFingerprint, storageVersion, verificationReport}
- errors: backup verify errors; LEDGER-CANDIDATE-SPACE-INSUFFICIENT exit9; LEDGER-CANDIDATE-PREPARE-FAILED exit8
tally ledger restore activate / ledger.restore.activate
- input: {candidateId, expectedCurrentFingerprint, authorizeReplacement: true}
- result: {activeGenerationId, activeFingerprint, recoveryGenerationId, activatedAt}
- errors: LEDGER-CANDIDATE-NOT-FOUND exit4; LEDGER-CANDIDATE-INVALID exit8; LEDGER-CURRENT-FINGERPRINT-STALE exit5; LEDGER-REPLACEMENT-AUTHORIZATION-REQUIRED exit6; LEDGER-ACTIVATION-FAILED exit8
tally ledger storage status / ledger.storage.status
- input: {}
- result: {contractVersion, supportedStorageVersions, currentStorageVersion, currentGenerationId, currentFingerprint, permissions, hostProtectionEvidence, integrityStatus}
- errors: common storage, integrity, and host errors
tally ledger storage evolution prepare / ledger.storage.evolution.prepare
- input: {targetStorageVersion}
- result: {candidateId, sourceFingerprint, candidateFingerprint, sourceStorageVersion, targetStorageVersion, verificationReport}
- errors: LEDGER-STORAGE-VERSION-UNSUPPORTED exit7; LEDGER-STORAGE-NEWER-THAN-BINARY exit7; LEDGER-CANDIDATE-SPACE-INSUFFICIENT exit9; LEDGER-CANDIDATE-PREPARE-FAILED exit8
tally ledger storage evolution activate / ledger.storage.evolution.activate
- input: {candidateId, expectedCurrentFingerprint, authorizeReplacement: true}
- result: same activation result as restore.activate
- errors: same activation errors as restore.activate

Constraints: paths are never emitted in diagnostics; result paths are owner-requested values. Prepare never changes CURRENT. Activate revalidates candidate and expected current fingerprint under the exclusive writer lock, atomically replaces CURRENT, and retains the previous generation as recovery.
